title: Installation Precautions
description:
Installation Precautions

Installation Precautions

PV1 supports eight types of GigE cameras.

Model	Resolution
		 (color, monochrome)

Standard GigE camera	640
		 x 480 (monochrome)

Standard 2 GigE camera	640
		 x 480 (monochrome)

1.3 mega-pixel 2 GigE camera	1280
		 x 1024 (monochrome)

2 mega-pixel 2 GigE camera	1600
		 x 1200 (monochrome)

2 mega-pixel 2 GigE color camera	1600
		 x 1200 (color)

2 mega-pixel GigE camera	1600
		 x 1200 (monochrome)

2 mega-pixel GigE color camera	1600
		 x 1200 (color)

5 mega-pixel GigE camera	2560
		 x 1920 (monochrome)

5 mega-pixel GigE color camera	2560
		 x 1920 (color)

5 mega-pixel 2 GigE camera	2560
		 x 1920 (monochrome)

5 mega-pixel 2 GigE color camera	2560
		 x 1920 (color)

10 mega-pixel GigE camera	3664
		 x 2748 (monochrome)

10 mega-pixel GigE color camera	3664
		 x 2748 (color)

20 mega-pixel GigE camera*	5472
		 x 3648 (monochrome)

20 mega-pixel GigE color camera *	5472
		 x 3648 (color)

For detailed specifications of each camera, refer to Camera.

For details of available network Controllers, refer to System Requirements.
